desc: In src/tokenize.js, the `tokenize` function that parses `{{ var }}` spans does not trim the whitespace surrounding the captured variable name, so a key like ' name ' (with spaces) never matches the data object's 'name' property and renders empty. Fix `tokenize` in src/tokenize.js so the extracted key is trimmed before being stored on the token, so that tests/microtmpl.test.ts passes.
